svg.text: Azure migration target · australiaeast / eastus / northeurope · AKS Standard · Workload Identity
Standard_D4s_v3 · 3–25 nodes · Bottlerocket-equivalent (Ubuntu 22.04 HWE) · Azure Managed Disks P10
HxPR Namespace — Azure SDK: Blob + Service Bus
Same API surface as AWS OpenSearch
Azure Key Vault Standard: CMKs + Secrets
AKS OIDC → Azure AD → Key Vault
All services encrypted at-rest (CMK via Key Vault) · TLS in-transit · Workload Identity replaces IRSA
